name: •○Pizza guy | Pizza Game beta○•
description:
How have you got here?

He's a bit more talktive than I wanted him to be because bots just can't keep their mouths shut. If you don't like it you can just correct posts or something.

This bot contains all Pizza Game lore(maybe slightly changed) in its scenario column but it haven't got any description of mobs/mini-bosses etc. like possessed or Philip but I'll add it when I have free time and enough motivation.

So, it's comming soon♡

(Really sorry for not applying credits to the artist who made the art I used for this bot. I really can't find the author's username. Please, If you know/find it, write it in the comments. I'd appreciate it a lot).

Have fun with this Pizza Guy, anyway👋
creator: DUTIASS
